title: ADAM Runtime Governance Interface (RGI) Compliance Schema
description: Machine-readable definition of the five RGI domains any runtime enforcement framework must satisfy to be ADAM-compatible. AGT satisfies all five domains natively. Alternative frameworks must document their RGI compliance against this schema.
adam_sovereign_boundary: This schema defines the interface. ADAM's CORE Engine, BOSS Score, Exception Economy, 5-Director Constitution, and 81-Agent Mesh topology are outside this interface and remain sovereign regardless of runtime implementation.

implementation_name.description: Name of the runtime governance implementation

implementation_license.description: Software license of the runtime implementation

languages_supported.description: Programming languages supported by the runtime implementation

agt_packages_used.description: [AGT Light only] AGT packages included in this deployment

RGI-01.title: Policy Enforcement
RGI-01.description: Intercept every agent action at invocation boundary; evaluate against active policies; permit, deny, or escalate

status.description: Compliance status for this RGI domain

latency_p99_ms.description: Measured p99 policy evaluation latency in milliseconds. AGT target: <0.1ms

evaluation_boundary.description: Where policy evaluation occurs in the execution flow

risk_acceptance_notes.description: Required if status is partially_satisfied. Document gaps and compensating controls.

RGI-02.title: Agent Identity
RGI-02.description: Issue and verify non-forgeable cryptographic identity for every agent; support mTLS; revoke compromised identities

trust_scoring_supported.description: Whether a continuous 0-1000 scale trust score per agent is available. AGT Agent Mesh provides this; most alternatives do not.

trust_score_scale.description: If trust scoring is supported, document the scale

adam_autonomous_threshold.description: Score required for SOAP-tier autonomous execution

RGI-03.title: Execution Containment
RGI-03.description: Enforce privilege boundaries on agent execution; prevent lateral movement; support emergency shutdown

examples: AGT Agent Runtime (execution rings + kill switch)

ring_to_adam_class_mapping.description: [AGT Light] Maps AGT execution rings to ADAM agent classes

emergency_shutdown_supported.description: Whether emergency kill switch / OHSHAT shutdown is architecturally enforced

saga_compensation_supported.description: Whether compensating transaction patterns for rollback are supported

RGI-04.title: Telemetry Emission
RGI-04.description: Emit structured audit events to Flight Recorder for every action evaluation; include BOSS Score inputs; OpenTelemetry-compatible

examples: AGT Agent SRE + Agent OS telemetry + ADAM RGI-04 adapter

otel_compatible.description: Whether telemetry output is OpenTelemetry W3C trace context compatible

flight_recorder_adapter_required.description: Whether an ADAM-provided adapter is required to bridge telemetry to Flight Recorder format

boss_score_inputs_available.description: Whether telemetry includes signals usable as BOSS Score dimension inputs (particularly Security Impact and Regulatory Impact)

slo_monitoring_supported.description: Whether quantitative SLOs, error budgets, and circuit breakers for agent meshes are supported

RGI-05.title: Tool and Plugin Governance
RGI-05.description: Verify integrity of external tools and plugins before agent invocation; maintain signed manifest registry; support revocation

revocation_registry_supported.description: Whether a revocation registry for compromised plugins/tools is maintained

mcp_v2_compatible.description: Whether tool governance integrates with MCP v2 (Model Context Protocol) tool invocation contracts

owasp_coverage.title: OWASP Agentic Application Top 10 Coverage
owasp_coverage.description: Documents how each OWASP risk (AA01-AA10, December 2025) is addressed by the combination of ADAM architecture and this runtime implementation

adam_architectural_control.description: ADAM blueprint layer / component providing architectural coverage

agt_runtime_enforcement.description: [AGT Light] AGT package providing runtime enforcement

deployment_asset.description: Specific deployment configuration asset implementing this coverage
